title: Saskatoon Berry Skewers with Mediterranean Glaze
description: A sweet and savory dessert featuring saskatoon berries, perfectly grilled to bring out their natural sweetness.
instructions: Thread saskatoon berries, pineapple, and red onion onto skewers.
Brush skewers with Mediterranean olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
Grill skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until berries are tender.
In a small bowl, whisk together honey and balsamic vinegar.
Brush glaze over skewers during last 2 minutes of grilling.
Serve warm, garnished with additional saskatoon berries if desired.
